form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months second last of 10 at Barcaldine Bm55 on April 4 over 1200m, 13 len behind Yes Larry with 63kg at $3.50. Previously second-up 6th of 10 at Eagle Farm Cl1-Sw on November 8 over 1200m, 6 len behind Now Is The Hour carrying 58kg at $17. Has won second up before but others are going much better.
